name: Microwave Oatmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the steel cut oatmeal in a quart-sized glass measuring bowl or similar container that can hold at least a liter of liquid.
2. Combine the oatmeal with 1 cup of water and add optional dried fruit if desired.
3. Stir the mixture to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
4. Cook for 10 minutes at 80% power in a 600-watt microwave.
Note: The oatmeal may boil over if cooked at full power (100%). Adjust the power percentage and cooking time as needed to prevent overflow.
